title: Inline add in element-select context may be problematic

features.name: unpacked array element selection with overflowing addition
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array with element selection using an addition expression on the index where overflow can occur when the index equals the maximum value for its bit width

features.name: concat wrapper to force context-determined index length
features.description: Code should include wrapping an addition index expression in concatenation to force context-determined length, avoiding self-determined overflow issues
